wg.meta.title: Wallet Generator
wg.meta.description: Deterministically generate a batch of wallets from one secret passphrase. Export an xpub QR for watch-only wallets and sign transactions air-gapped — all in your browser, fully offline.
wg.title: Wallet Generator
wg.subtitle: Turn one secret phrase into a whole batch of wallets — deterministic, repeatable, and fully offline.
wg.security.title: Run this offline. Your secret never leaves the browser.
wg.security.body: Everything is computed locally — no network requests. For real funds, use an air-gapped device. ⚠️ Your wallets are only as strong as your passphrase: a short or guessable phrase WILL be brute-forced and drained. Use a long, high-entropy secret you do not reuse anywhere.
wg.pass.label: Secret passphrase
wg.strength.fair: Fair — still risky for real funds
wg.words.label: Mnemonic length
wg.mnemonic.label: Derived mnemonic
wg.chain.label: Chain
wg.addressType.label: Address type
wg.hdPath.label: HD derivation path
wg.gen.heading: Generate wallets
wg.gen.empty: Pick a range above to derive wallets.
wg.xpub.desc: Scan this into MetaMask (Connect hardware wallet → QR-based) to add this seed as a watch-only account. It exposes only the public key — never the private key.
wg.sign.desc: Scan an unsigned request (animated QR) from a watch-only wallet, review it, then sign offline and show the signature back as a QR.
wg.sign.fpBad: ⚠️ Fingerprint does NOT match this seed — this request was meant for a different wallet.
wg.sign.resultTip: Scan this back into the watch-only wallet to broadcast.
wg.sign.error: Could not read this request. Make sure it is an eth-sign-request QR.
